records.ety: [L. litterarius, literarius, fr. littera, litera, a letter: cf. F. littraire. See Letter.]

defs: Of or pertaining to letters or literature; pertaining to learning or learned men; as, literary fame; a literary history; literary conversation.
quotes: He has long outlived his century, the term commonly fixed as the test of literary merit.

defs: Versed in, or acquainted with, literature; occupied with literature as a profession; connected with literature or with men of letters; as, a literary man.
quotes: In the literary as well as fashionable world.
